title: Neon Cyberpunk Samurai
prompt: Cinematic photography of a lone samurai standing in a rain-soaked neon cyberpunk metropolis. Ultra-detailed glowing katana, reflections in puddles, dramatic cinematic lighting, volumetrics, 8k resolution, photorealistic, rule of thirds, anamorphic lens flare.
description: A stunning blend of traditional samurai aesthetics with futuristic Blade Runner style cyberpunk elements.

title: Ethereal Glass Butterfly
prompt: A macro shot of a delicate butterfly made entirely of intricately carved, glowing iridescent glass resting on a dew-covered fern. Prismatic light refraction, bokeh background, hyper-detailed, award-winning macro photography, f/1.8 aperture.
description: Showcases extreme detail in macro photography mixed with light refraction and transparency.

title: Minimalist Smart Home Dashboard UI
prompt: A clean, modern minimalist smart home dashboard UI design displayed on a sleek tablet. Dark mode, subtle glassmorphism elements, neon blue accents, intuitive temperature and lighting controls, elegant typography, high-fidelity UI mockup.
description: Perfect reference for app layout, UX design, and modern dark-mode aesthetics.

title: Abandoned Astronaut on Alien World
prompt: An astronaut with a cracked visor sitting on a monolithic structure overlooking a vast, bioluminescent alien jungle. Giant planetary rings in the sky, melancholic mood, highly detailed matte painting, trending on ArtStation, majestic scale.
description: A deeply atmospheric sci-fi piece emphasizing grand scale and emotional storytelling.

title: Isometric Cozy Coffee Shop
prompt: An isometric 3D render of a cozy, detailed corner coffee shop interior. Warm lighting, espresso machines, tiny baristas, potted plants, cute aesthetic, soft pastel colors, highly detailed, octane render, stylized.
description: A perfect prompt for generating isometric architecture and game assets.

title: Enchanted Forest Treehouse
prompt: A multi-level intricate wooden treehouse built into a colossal ancient oak tree in a misty enchanted forest. Glowing lanterns, winding staircases, ethereal morning light piercing through the canopy, fantasy artwork.
description: A high-fantasy environment piece with dramatic lighting and intricate architectural details.

title: Premium Matte Black Watch Product Shot
prompt: Professional commercial product photography of a sleek, matte black luxury smartwatch hovering above a dark rippling liquid surface. Dramatic studio spotlight, crisp edges, high-end retail aesthetic, 8k resolution.
description: Tests the model's ability to render sleek industrial design and studio lighting.

title: Abstract Geometric Flow
prompt: Abstract digital art featuring flowing metallic ribbons of copper and teal weaving through geometric obsidian monoliths. Generative art style, smooth gradients, crisp 3D visualization, elegant motion.
description: A stunning non-representational composition perfect for wallpapers or brand backgrounds.

title: Vibrant Anime Street Food Market
prompt: A bustling Japanese street food market at night in high-quality anime style (Studio Ghibli inspired). Steam rising from Takoyaki stalls, colourful hanging lanterns, expressive characters, rich detailed background, warm inviting colors.
description: Tests detailed manga/anime style illustration with complex crowds and lighting.

title: Regal Lion Portrait
prompt: An extreme close-up portrait of a majestic lion with a dark, moody background. Golden hour rim lighting illuminating its mane, hyper-realistic fur texture, intense piercing amber eyes, wildlife photography masterpiece.
description: Focuses on hyper-realistic animal texturing and dramatic eye-catching framing.
